title: 留心笔记
subTitle: 雁过留声，风过留痕
allHead: <script src='../assets/RonanTheme.js'></script><script src='../assets/GmeekVercount.js'></script><script async src='https://cdn.seline.com/seline.js' data-token='980dcab9ed188b4'></script><script　src='https://app.rybbit.io/api/script.js'　data-site-id='07c1f2ea718b'　defer></script><script async src='https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-9661896697976587' crossorigin='anonymous'></script>
script: <script src='../assets/ArticleTOC.js'></script><script src='../assets/lightbox.js'></script><script src='../assets/oneko.js/oneko.js' data-cat='../assets/oneko.js/oneko.gif'></script><script>document.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(anchor => {const img = anchor.querySelector('img');if (img && img.hasAttribute('data-canonical-src')) {const canonicalSrc = img.getAttribute('data-canonical-src');anchor.setAttribute('href', canonicalSrc);img.setAttribute('src', canonicalSrc);img.removeAttribute('data-canonical-src');}});</script><script>fetch('https://note.142588.xyz/blogBase.json').then(response => response.json()).then(data => {const posts = data.postListJson;const currentPath = window.location.pathname;const keys = Object.keys(posts).reverse();let prevPost = null;let nextPost = null;for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {if (currentPath.includes(posts[keys[i]].postUrl)) {if (i > 0) prevPost = posts[keys[i-1]];if (i < keys.length - 1) nextPost = posts[keys[i+1]];break;}}const mainElement = document.getElementById('content');if (mainElement) {const navElement = document.createElement('nav');navElement.className = 'post-navigation';navElement.style.display = 'flex';navElement.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';navElement.style.marginTop = '20px';if (prevPost) {const prevButton = document.createElement('a');prevButton.href = '../' + prevPost.postUrl;prevButton.innerHTML = '<button class="btn" type="button">← ' + prevPost.postTitle + '</button>';navElement.appendChild(prevButton);} else {navElement.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));}if (nextPost) {const nextButton = document.createElement('a');nextButton.href = '../' + nextPost.postUrl;nextButton.innerHTML = '<button class="btn" type="button">' + nextPost.postTitle + ' →</button>';navElement.appendChild(nextButton);}mainElement.appendChild(navElement);}});</script>
bottomText: ❤️ 转载文章请注明出处，谢谢！❤️
